PowerShell($tcp = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8000 -State Listen | Select-Object -First 1; if \($tcp\) { $proc = Get-Process -Id $tcp.OwningProcess -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($proc\) { Write-Output "alive PID $\($tcp.OwningProcess\) \($\($proc.ProcessName\)\) started $\($proc.StartTime\)"; try { Stop-Process -Id $tcp.OwningProcess -Force; Write-Output "killed" } catch { Write-Output "kill failed: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" } } else { Write-Output "ghost PID $\($tcp.OwningProcess\) — TIME_WAIT will clear" } } else { Write-Output "no listener" }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 4; $left = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Output "remaining listeners: $\($left.Count\)")

PowerShell($pids = @\(28448, 44616, 20864, 40756, 38876, 45240, 39260, 14720\); foreach \($p in $pids\) { try { Stop-Process -Id $p -Force -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Output "killed $p" } catch { Write-Output "skip $p \($\($_.Exception.Message.Substring\(0,[Math]::Min\(50,$_.Exception.Message.Length\)\)\)\)" } }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; $netstat = \(netstat -ano | Select-String ":8000 " | Select-String "LISTENING"\); Write-Output "remaining LISTENING entries: $\($netstat.Count\)"; $netstat | ForEach-Object { Write-Output $_.ToString\(\).Substring\(0,80\) })
